scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:dev: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET=dev VITE_EXTENSION_API_BASE_URL=https://dev.neimou.com VITE_EXTENSION_NAME='跨境图片助手 Dev' vite build --outDir dist-dev && EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET=dev VITE_EXTENSION_API_BASE_URL=https://dev.neimou.com VITE_EXTENSION_NAME='跨境图片助手 Dev' node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs dist-dev
scripts.build:prod: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET=prod VITE_EXTENSION_API_BASE_URL=https://imagen.neimou.com VITE_EXTENSION_NAME='跨境图片助手' vite build --outDir dist-prod && EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET=prod VITE_EXTENSION_API_BASE_URL=https://imagen.neimou.com VITE_EXTENSION_NAME='跨境图片助手' node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs dist-prod
